description: Lane-1 browser proof: static files only. Uses the same listen contract as production `udos-web` (see config/env/udos-web.env.example).

transport.implementation: python3 scripts/lib/serve_static_http.py (default bind 127.0.0.1 uses IPv6 dual-stack :: so localhost → ::1 works)

notes: Numeric defaults match scripts/lib/udos-web-listen.sh and config/env/udos-web.env.example; override with UDOS_WEB_BIND / UDOS_WEB_PORT only.
Production static root is ~/.udos/publish/static; this demo uses repo examples/command-centre-demo/ instead.
For UDOS_WEB_BIND=127.0.0.1 the demo binds :: with IPV6_V6ONLY=0 when the OS supports it, so browsers using IPv6 loopback still connect.
